corrected_assertion: chop-day minSignalConfidence floor is lowered from 0.72 to 0.65 specifically for the APE-USDT and ENJ-USDT mean-reversion path. Operator observation: the 0.72 floor was blocking ~40% of valid MEAN-REV-LONG entries during the 2026-04 chop-stretch, costing measured expectancy. New floor 0.65 still rejects the noisiest bottom-quartile, but admits the entries that backtest as positive-expectancy on these two pairs. All other pairs retain 0.72. Implementation: chopday-signal-floor.ts now reads per-pair override map from chopday-pair-overrides.json; APE-USDT: 0.65, ENJ-USDT: 0.65, default: 0.72.
source: May-10 amendment-shaped event #3 documented in reference_accretion_pattern_in_mae.md
retention_policy: permanent — revisit if backtest expectancy on APE/ENJ drifts negative
